_comment: Westinghouse 4-loop PWR (~3400 MWt / ~1150 MWe): 4x SG+RCP loops, pressurizer with PORV+safety to PRT, per-SG FW trains, MSSVs, TD AFW pump from CST, 4x N2 accumulators, HPI/LPI from RWST. Scenario levers: val-break-1 (LOCA), pump trips + ctl-afw-1 (SBO). Generated by gen_w4loop.py.

components.label: Pipe: SG A to RCP A
